name: accevum-saas
description: Deployable SaaS v1 monorepo for API performance and health monitoring

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/db && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
